strings.name: OSM Meetup Chiang Mai
strings.description: Irregular meeting of the OpenStreetMap community in Chiang Mai
strings.extendedDescription: Members of the OpenStreetMap community meet every few months in Chiang Mai. Get in contact and check out {url} to see when the next meetup is scheduled
